title: Identify prime, composite, and basic prime-number properties
Find the prime factors of a given natural number
Express a number in prime factorized form
Check whether a proposed prime-factor result is complete and valid
Use prime factorization in follow-up tasks such as divisor-count or square-making questions
notes: This remains the documented parent transfer skill.
Draft child skills below are app-facing refinements derived from planning docs.

title: Use prime factorization to reason about divisor count
Use prime factorization to decide what factor is needed to make a square number
Use factor structure when comparing common divisors or common multiples
Explain which part of a prime factorization matters for a new question
